name: ThePedroo
desc: Pedro is a 17 years old C and JavaScript programmer at Brazil. Loving FOSS, created PerformanC, and as of the time, maintains the majority of the projects.

name: RainyXeon
desc: RainyXeon, also known as Rainy, is a 18 years old programmer from Vietnam. The musicomanic, programming for almost 7 years, is an Android developer, a Discord bot developer, and a front-end developer. As of the time, maintaining ReZygisk.

name: 1Lucas1apk
desc: Lucas, a 20 years old boy, born at Brazil, is a TypeScript, JavaScript, Java and Python developer. Currently, the music lover is a maintaining NodeLink and the related projects.

name: Nicolas De Sá (TheToddyn)
desc: Nicolas, a brazilian 19 years old programmer. Learning JavaScript and Python, the brazilian has been trying to get to know the programming world.

name: TehPig
desc: TehPig is a [[REDACTED]] years old programmer. Knowing JavaScript, TehPig is mainly known for his Discord bots: T bots, being the most famous one out of the two the T Music Bot. However, aside from bots, the YouTuber also creates APIs and Minecraft servers.
